modern: .resume-container { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; background: #ffffff; color: #333333; line-height: 1.5; padding: 40px; } .resume-header { border-bottom: 2px solid #2c3e50; margin-bottom: 30px; padding-bottom: 20px; } .resume-header h1 { margin: 0; color: #2c3e50; font-size: 2.5em; font-weight: normal; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2px; } .resume-header .contact-info { margin-top: 10px; font-size: 0.95em; color: #555; } .section { margin-bottom: 25px; } .section h2 { color: #2c3e50; font-size: 1.2em; margin: 0 0 15px 0; padding-bottom: 5px; border-bottom: 1px solid #2c3e50; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; } .job-title { font-weight: bold; font-size: 1.05em; } .company { font-style: italic; } .date { float: right; font-style: italic; color: #666; } ul { margin: 8px 0; padding-left: 25px; }
minimal: .resume-container { font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto; background: #ffffff; color: #1a1a1a; line-height: 1.6; padding: 40px; } .resume-header { margin-bottom: 40px; } .resume-header h1 { margin: 0; font-size: 2em; font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: -1px; } .resume-header .contact-info { margin-top: 8px; font-size: 0.9em; color: #666; } .section { margin-bottom: 35px; } .section h2 { font-size: 0.75em; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2px; color: #999; margin: 0 0 20px 0; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; } .job-title { font-weight: 500; } .company { color: #666; } .date { color: #999; font-size: 0.85em; } ul { margin: 12px 0; padding-left: 20px; } li { margin: 8px 0; }
professional: .resume-container { font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, sans-serif; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; background: #ffffff; color: #1e3a5f; line-height: 1.6; padding: 50px; border-left: 15px solid #1e3a5f; } .resume-header { margin-bottom: 30px; } .resume-header h1 { margin: 0; color: #1e3a5f; font-size: 2.2em; font-weight: 700; } .resume-header .contact-info { margin-top: 5px; font-size: 0.95em; color: #1e3a5f; } .section { margin-bottom: 25px; } .section h2 { color: #1e3a5f; font-size: 1.3em; margin: 0 0 15px 0; padding-bottom: 5px; border-bottom: 2px solid #1e3a5f; } .job-title { font-weight: bold; color: #1e3a5f; } .company { font-weight: 600; color: #34495e; } .date { color: #7f8c8d; font-size: 0.9em; } ul { margin: 10px 0; padding-left: 20px; } li { margin: 5px 0; }
executive: .resume-container { font-family: 'Garamond', Georgia, serif; max-width: 850px; margin: 0 auto; background: #ffffff; color: #000000; line-height: 1.5; padding: 60px; } .resume-header { text-align: center; border-bottom: 1px double #000; margin-bottom: 40px; padding-bottom: 20px; } .resume-header h1 { margin: 0; font-size: 2.4em; font-weight: bold; letter-spacing: 1px; } .resume-header .contact-info { margin-top: 10px; font-size: 1em; color: #333; } .section { margin-bottom: 30px; } .section h2 { text-align: center; font-size: 1.1em; font-weight: bold; border-top: 1px solid #000; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; padding: 5px 0; margin: 0 0 20px 0; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2px; } .job-title { font-weight: bold; } .company { text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.9em; letter-spacing: 1px; } .date { font-weight: bold; }
creative: .resume-container { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; max-width: 850px; margin: 0 auto; background: #ffffff; color: #2d3436; line-height: 1.6; padding: 0; display: flex; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .sidebar { width: 30%; background: #2d3436; color: #ffffff; padding: 40px 30px; } .main-content { width: 70%; padding: 40px 50px; } .resume-header h1 { margin: 0; font-size: 2.2em; color: #2d3436; } .sidebar h2 { font-size: 1.1em; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); padding-bottom: 10px; margin-top: 30px; } .main-content h2 { font-size: 1.3em; color: #6c5ce7; border-bottom: 2px solid #6c5ce7; padding-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 30px; }
